answer.notes: entity_count=38, 100% LWPOLYLINE on a single insulation layer (X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL), each with vertices=5 -- a homogeneous set of small closed boundary polygons, the signature of an anonymous hatch/insulation-batt boundary block (*U-prefixed anonymous block name) rather than a named furniture or dimension-cache block. No coordinate data is present in the projection, so individual entities cannot be distinguished as wall-line-like versus insulation-boundary-like; wall_likelihood reflects that insulation typically runs adjacent to walls but these entities are the insulation fill boundaries, not wall centerlines/faces themselves.
